Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 159 

SR_NVGTN_OPT_IN_OUT_IND 

LABEL: Beneficiary Opted In or Out of Navigation services 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR)Beneficiary opted in or out of navigation services. 

LONG NAME: SR_NVGTN_OPT_IN_OUT_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Opted out 
1 = Opted in 
Missing - Not eligible 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “SR” include
